transcript: This is an outrage. I didn't get to work an hour late just to be the first one here. I'm sorry, Trey. Unfortunately, I'm sorry I'm late. I was busy burning down the Panda Express that I had fallen in love with. Oh my god, Jeff, are you okay? I'm fine, Liz. I'm just having a celebrity breakdown. It's the new sex tape. Something I wish I'd known before I released my sex tape as this wax guy.

timestamps.text: This is an outrage. I didn't get to work an hour late just to be the first one here.
I'm sorry, Trey. Unfortunately, I'm sorry I'm late.
I was busy burning down the Panda Express that I had fallen in love with.
Oh my god, Jeff, are you okay?
I'm fine, Liz. I'm just having a celebrity breakdown.
It's the new sex tape. Something I wish I'd known before I released my sex tape as this wax guy.
